title: Nested preload: posts with their comments
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_posts_and_comments/0` that returns users with `:posts` and nested `{posts: [:comments]}` preloaded. Use `preload: [posts: :comments]`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Nested keyword-list preload syntax; easy once you've seen it once.
